response.justification: The candidate is a poor fit for this role. The position requires 5-10 years of strong, hands-on C++ development on Windows and expertise in capital markets or fixed income. The candidate's resume shows only a single, brief C++ role from nearly a decade ago. Their recent and extensive experience is in web technologies (TypeScript, Node.js) and Dlang, with no demonstrated background in the required financial domains. This represents a fundamental mismatch with the core requirements of the job.
strengths: Broad experience as a senior/staff engineer, including at well-known tech companies.
Strong background in modern development practices, including CI/CD, Docker, and Kubernetes.
Excellent communication skills, evidenced by experience creating and delivering workshops and talks.
concerns: Critically lacks the required 5-10 years of C++ experience; only a 7-month C++ role is listed, from 2015.
No experience in the mandatory financial domains like Capital Markets, Fixed Income, or Investment Banking.
Recent decade of experience is focused on web development (Node.js, TypeScript) and Dlang, not C++ on Windows.
